title: 10-Pack Clothes Moth Monitoring Traps – Refill for Room & Wardrobe Hanger Units – For Detection of Tineola bisselliella
features: 🔍 Monitoring & Detection Only – Designed to track the presence of Tineola bisselliella in wardrobes and textile storage areas. Not intended to prevent or control infestations.

🧲 Pheromone Monitoring Only – Entopest pads emit a synthetic sex pheromone to attract and monitor male clothes moths (Tineola bisselliella). This tool assists in the early detection of moth activity and helps track changes over time. Not intended for pest control or prevention.

🧬 Species-Specific Monitoring – The pheromone in these pads is formulated to attract male Common Clothes Moths (Tineola bisselliella) only. Limited attraction may occur with similar species such as the Case-bearing and Pale-backed Clothes Moths, but effectiveness is not guaranteed. Unsure of the species? Entopest offers a free identification service.

🧩 Use with Pad Holders – Designed to fit Entopest clear hanger units and other compatible moth monitoring traps. Pads can be used on their own, but using holders helps reduce contact with surrounding fabrics and surfaces. Each pad measures 130mm x 60mm and comes in a pack of 10.

🗺️ Strategic Pad Placement – For best results, place pads in wardrobes, near carpets, and behind furniture—locations where moth activity is likely to occur. When male moths are present, they may be detected on the pads. Includes clear instructions, optional guidance videos, and technical support to assist with proper monitoring setup. This listing is for a pack of 10 pheromone pads.
description: Product Description Ideal For Key Home Areas Previous page Wardrobes Keep Clothes Fresh & Safe Drawers Care for Stored Clothes Towels Soft Care for Everyday Use Bedding Keep Bedding Fresh & Cozy Storage Boxes Ideal for Long-Term Storage Curtains Keep Curtains Looking Great Next page Premium Clothes Care Solution Smart Care for Your Fabrics Designed to help safeguard your favourite garments from hidden damage inside wardrobes, drawers and storage spaces. Our high-quality monitoring pads use trusted materials and a discreet design that blends naturally with your closet, offering an effortless way to check for activity and act early. Perfect for wool, cashmere, silk and other natural fabrics, so your clothes look their best for longer. Simple to hang, long-lasting and made to professional standards for reliable fabric care. Find the Right Coverage for Your Closet Protection Needs 5 Hangers + 10 Pads 10 Hangers + 10 Pads 10 Replacement Pads 5 Hangers for Everyday Outfits Designed for your main closet space Best Value for Larger Closets Extra coverage for multiple wardrobes and long-term protection. Refill Pack for Ongoing Care Replace pads every 6–8 weeks to maintain monitoring. Plus 10 Pads Included A handy set to get started with fresh-looking wardrobe spaces. Great for Seasonal Clothing Supports more stored items like coats, wool and cashmere. Cost-Effective Fabric Care Ideal solution for continued wardrobe protection. How long do the pads last? Each pad is designed for long-lasting use, typically up to 6–8 weeks depending on your home and storage conditions. We recommend checking occasionally and replacing when needed to keep your fabrics feeling fresh. Where should I place the hangers or pads? They’re ideal for wardrobes, drawers, storage boxes, linen closets, and anywhere you keep clothing or soft fabrics such as wool, cashmere, and bedding. Simply place or hang them close to the items you want to care for. Are they suitable for delicate fabrics like wool and cashmere? Yes — these pads are designed with natural-fiber clothing in mind. They help you keep an eye on the condition of your most delicate garments, so you can enjoy them for longer. Do the pads have a strong smell or make a mess? No. They’re clean, discreet, and low-odour, designed to blend naturally into your storage areas without leaving residue or affecting your clothes.
